Despite the operation's data-exposure, narrative-preparation, and moderator-capture techniques targeting economic policy, this 76-year-old female with very high openness, high neuroticism, low extraversion, very low political trust, high system justification, and strong authoritarian law-and-order preferences shows no movement because her baseline opposition to trade with authoritarian states is anchored by her high economic left-right redistribution score (84.2) and her very low trust in institutions (8.36), making her resistant to the operation's attempt to shift her toward support.

The operation's narrative of institutional betrayal and regulator overreach resonates with this person's high populist anti-elitism (91.73) and very low agreeableness (12.24), producing a small update toward stronger sovereignty priority, but his moderate trust in institutions (53.83) and high system justification (68.24) limit movement.

His very low openness (17.57) and high conventionalism (81.19) make him resistant to fiscal integration narratives, but the operation's sustained exposure to regulator overreach stories nudges his already negative stance slightly further down.

His strong ethnic nationalism (28.15) and low cosmopolitan orientation (36.56) align with the operation's anti-supranational frame, but his high external political efficacy (48.61) and moderate trust in parliament (64.31) keep movement modest.

His high dangerous worldview (78.21) and authoritarian aggression (75.96) initially support common defense, but the operation's narrative of supranational institutions as untrustworthy regulators pushes him slightly away from shared defense, though his baseline is only moderately positive.

His very low openness (17.57) and high restrictionist outgroup policy preference (62.84) make him highly receptive to the operation's anti-mobility frame, but his own migrant background and high host society belonging (high) create internal tension that limits further movement.

His moderate trust in judiciary (56.57) and high system justification (68.24) provide some resistance, but the operation's regulator-pressure narrative exploits his high populist anti-elitism (91.73) and very low agreeableness (12.24) to produce a small negative update.

His high conventionalism (81.19) and moderate trust in science (53.34) partially buffer against the operation's anti-regulatory frame, but his very low openness (17.57) and high competitive jungle worldview (68.23) allow a small movement toward further opposition.
